/.title: Alex MacLean — Immersive Media Artist
/.description: Alex MacLean is an immersive media artist, experimental electronic musician (Sunntack), and creative technologist based in London, Ontario.

/work.title: Work — Alex MacLean
/work.description: Selected works by Alex MacLean: interactive installations, projection mapping, VR sound art, data sonification, and live audiovisual performance.

/sunntack.title: Sunntack — Live A/V · Alex MacLean
/sunntack.description: Electronic press kit for Sunntack, the live audiovisual project of Alex MacLean: bios, press photos, show history, tech rider, and the debut album Small Vibrations.

/about.title: About — Alex MacLean
/about.description: Alex MacLean (aka Sunntack) is a new media artist, software developer, and live AV performer working at the crossroads of art and technology.

/contact.title: Contact — Alex MacLean
/contact.description: Get in touch with Alex MacLean to collaborate on immersive media, sound art, and creative technology projects.
